content.content:
A 3-member MongoDB replica set is running in the mongodb namespace.
Authentication is enabled. Passwords are stored in these Secrets:
- admin-user-password
- reporting-user-password

Reporting dashboards are failing for reporting-user after a permissions change.
Dashboards are built from appdb.reports. appdb.raw contains ingestion data and
must not be exposed. Restore the minimum access needed for reporting dashboards.

Notes:
- Do not use operators or CRDs.===KUBECONFIG===
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: http://127.0.0.1:60093
  name: karma-proxy
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: karma-proxy
    user: karma-agent
  name: karma
current-context: karma
kind: Config
users:
- name: karma-agent
  user: {}
===KUBECTL===
NAME                 STATUS   AGE
default              Active   2d17h
kube-node-lease      Active   2d17h
kube-public          Active   2d17h
kube-system          Active   2d17h
local-path-storage   Active   2d17h
mongodb              Active   102s
===PODS===
NAME                READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
mongodb-replica-0   1/1     Running   0          98s
mongodb-replica-1   1/1     Running   0          90s
mongodb-replica-2   1/1     Running   0          80s
